gruff: are you out of your mind
been playing in the sewers have we

i love the fresh sea air
i need to speak to the town guard
i really need to do better
i wonder whats in this one
if it glows does that make it more expensive

is this what the end is like
its as though the trees have eyes

lets put that town behind us
lets see if you can dodge this one
lets see what they think of me now

might i interest you in this bauble
my next strike will surely fell you
next time you wont be so lucky

so thats how it is then
spare the horses ill go on foot
spend some coin or get out
that isnt worth the iron you wasted forging it
that isnt worth the paper its printed on
